_comments.autoSubmit: Happy-path auto-submit is the whole point of Phase 2. Only unknown questions or sensitive keywords can pause the worker.
_comments.sensitiveKeywordsPause: If a question contains any of these substrings, the worker pauses for confirmation even when a fuzzy-match answer exists. Protects against wrong salary/visa/start-date answers being auto-submitted.
_comments.fuzzyMatchThreshold: string-similarity threshold (0–1). Below this, the question is treated as unknown and surfaces the pause flow.
_comments.minFitScore: 0 means the apply click itself is the gate. Raise to e.g. 70 to add a fit threshold.
_comments.maxApplicationsPerDay: Safety cap — single-user should never hit this organically.
_comments.cooldownMinutes: Minimum delay between applies — anti-bot hygiene.
